title: Amazon EKS Auto Mode | Fully Automated Kubernetes Clusters
summary: Amazon EKS Auto Mode is a fully managed Kubernetes service that provisions production-grade clusters with a single click. It automates control plane and data plane management while allowing customization, and includes features like Karpenter-based auto-scaling and cost optimization for AI workloads including inference and training.
